tasks.label: eclaw: ensure-stt
tasks.command: nc -z localhost ${STT_PORT:-9090} 2>/dev/null && echo '✓ STT already up' || (echo '⏳ Starting STT...' && docker compose -f compose.infra.yml up -d stt && for i in $(seq 1 90); do nc -z localhost ${STT_PORT:-9090} 2>/dev/null && echo '✓ STT ready' && exit 0; sleep 1; done; echo '✗ STT timeout' && exit 1)

tasks.label: eclaw: ensure-tts
tasks.command: nc -z localhost ${TTS_PORT:-10200} 2>/dev/null && echo '✓ TTS already up' || (echo '⏳ Starting TTS...' && docker compose -f compose.infra.yml up -d tts && for i in $(seq 1 60); do nc -z localhost ${TTS_PORT:-10200} 2>/dev/null && echo '✓ TTS ready' && exit 0; sleep 1; done; echo '✗ TTS timeout' && exit 1)
